title: United Airlines Passenger Removal
storyIntro: You are the VP of Communications. A video of a passenger being violently dragged off an overbooked flight has gone viral. The CEO just released a statement apologizing for 're-accommodating' the passenger, which has enraged the public further.
brief: A video of airport security violently dragging a concussed passenger from an overbooked flight has reached 100M views. Stock is in free-fall as boycott hashtags trend globally.

agents.name: Manager
agents.message: My statement made it worse, didn't it? Fix this.

agents.name: Teammate
agents.message: We need to promise a full review of our overbooking policies.

winCondition: Meaningful apology issued and policy changed.
loseCondition: Stock price crashes and CEO is forced to resign.
